# AI, Expertise, and Human Judgment Audit Checklist

- [ ] AI-supported tasks are clearly defined.
- [ ] Prohibited uses are documented.
- [ ] Expert responsibilities are documented.
- [ ] Final decision authority is explicit.
- [ ] AI confidence and uncertainty are visible.
- [ ] Missing evidence can be recorded.
- [ ] Experts can override model outputs.
- [ ] Expert disagreement is logged.
- [ ] Automation-bias indicators are monitored.
- [ ] Novice and expert reliance patterns are reviewed.
- [ ] Skill degradation indicators are tracked.
- [ ] Outcome feedback is incorporated.
- [ ] Appeals or complaints are reviewed.
- [ ] Training materials are current.
- [ ] Fallback procedures exist if the AI system is unavailable.
